message:
fix: improve guidance_discover project root detection

Use multi-strategy approach to find .claude/ directory:
1. Check process.cwd() first (most common when invoked by user)
2. Walk up from CLI package location
3. Walk up from CWD as fallback

Fixes discovery returning 0 agents/skills when running from
a subdirectory within the project.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
